_comment: Japanese-band-only mode. Sources: Spincoaster (indie/R&B/hip-hop leaning) and ROCKIN'ON JAPAN's news feed (broader rock scene, including the live-house/college-band circuit) — both use the same “…”-for-songs/『』-for-albums convention. excludeKeywords is a best-effort nationality filter (see README). excludeArtists is a manual safety net for major-label/veteran acts that slip through (either because they still match the release-announcement format, or because the YouTube search fallback occasionally attaches the wrong channel's stats and skews the buzz ratio).
